# Don't Touch Purple — Full Reference

> A reflex-based grid-tapping game where players tap cells to score while avoiding purple. Built with React 19, TypeScript 5, Vite 7, Firebase, and OGL/WebGL backgrounds.

Don't Touch Purple is a fast-paced reaction game with progressively harder stages, special cells (shield, freeze, multiplier, bomb, medpack), boss events, rare color modes, 37 achievements, 12 GPU-accelerated backgrounds, bot assist, and a global leaderboard. Two game modes: Classic (fixed 3x3) and Evolve (progressive grid stages with boss encounters).

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React 19, TypeScript 5, Vite 7, Framer Motion 12, GSAP 3.15
- **Rendering:** OGL 1.0 (WebGL backgrounds), Canvas API, dotlottie-web
- **Backend:** Firebase 12 (Firestore, Auth, Analytics), Cloudflare Workers
- **Testing:** Vitest 4.1, Playwright 1.59, jsdom
- **Build:** Vite, PostCSS, autoprefixer, cssnano, terser, rollup-plugin-visualizer
- **CI/CD:** GitHub Actions, semantic-release, Firebase Hosting
- **Monitoring:** Sentry 10, GameAnalytics, Microsoft Clarity, web-vitals

## Project Structure

```
├── App.tsx                          Main state machine, game lifecycle orchestrator
├── main.tsx                         Entry point, root render
├── engine/                          Pure game logic (zero React)
│   ├── GameEngine.ts                Main game loop, player state, boss events
│   ├── botController.ts             Bot assist AI
│   ├── achievements.ts              37 achievement tracker
│   ├── rng.ts                       Deterministic PRNG (mulberry32)
│   └── subsystems/
│       ├── TickProcessor.ts         Per-tick cell spawning, rare color, difficulty
│       ├── CellLifecycle.ts         Cell click handling, special cell effects
│       ├── BossEngine.ts            Boss event logic
│       └── ScoreSync.ts             Score queue, IndexedDB persistence
├── components/
│   ├── Cell/index.tsx               Cell rendering, click handling
│   ├── Animations/                  EnergyDrop, FreezeDrop, ShieldDrop
│   ├── Backgrounds/                 17 OGL/WebGL themes (GPU-accelerated)
│   ├── HUD/                         PlayerPanel, GameArea, ScoreFloat, EnergyBar, Hearts, BossOverlay
│   ├── Layout/                      ParticleLayer
│   ├── Leaderboard/                 LeaderboardPanel, ChampionSpotlight
│   ├── Screens/                     StartScreen, GameOver, HowToPlay, RewardsHub, Shop, PauseOverlay, DailyChallenges, ShareModal, GameMaster
│   └── Settings/                    DevOverlay, BuildDeploySection
├── hooks/
│   └── useGameEngine.ts             React ↔ Engine bridge (snapshot provider)
├── services/
│   ├── firebase.ts                  Firebase init, Firestore, Analytics, Auth
│   ├── firestoreService.ts          Score submission, leaderboard queries
│   └── scoreSync.ts                 Offline queue, batched writes, IDB
├── workers/
│   └── scoreWorker.ts               Cloudflare Worker score proxy
├── config/
│   ├── game.ts                      Balance constants, difficulty curves
│   ├── patterns.ts                  Grid cell patterns per stage
│   └── difficulty.ts                Scaling parameters
├── utils/
│   ├── audio.ts                     Sound effects
│   ├── i18n.ts                      Internationalization
│   ├── session.ts                   Session management
│   └── analytics.ts                 Event tracking
├── docs/
│   ├── agents/                      Domain-specific agent definitions
│   └── wiki/                        Community knowledge base (8 pages)
├── DESIGN.md                        MD3 design tokens, Hyper-Juice Arcade palette
├── AGENTS.md                        Universal AI tool instructions
├── llms.txt                         AI agent discoverability (this file)
└── CLAUDE.md                        Detailed project instructions
```

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        App.tsx                              │
│  (Main screen state machine, game lifecycle orchestration)  │
└─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────┘
                      │
        ┌─────────────┼─────────────┐
        ▼             ▼             ▼
   ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────┐
   │ Engine   │ │Components│ │ Services │
   │ (pure    │ │ (React   │ │ (Firebase│
   │  logic)  │ │  UI)     │ │  Auth)   │
   └──────────┘ └──────────┘ └──────────┘
        │             │
        ▼             ▼
   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ config/ — Game balance, difficulty, grid patterns       │
   └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## Key APIs

### GameEngine (engine/GameEngine.ts)
- `start(mode, stage)` — Initialize game session
- `tick(dt)` — Process one game frame
- `handleClick(cellIndex)` — Process player input
- `pause() / resume()` — Pause control
- `getSnapshot()` — Current game state for UI

### TickProcessor (engine/subsystems/TickProcessor.ts)
- `processTick(cells, dt, difficulty)` — Spawn cells, apply rare color chance
- `calculateDifficulty(tick, stage)` — Progressive difficulty scaling

### CellLifecycle (engine/subsystems/CellLifecycle.ts)
- `handleCellClick(cell, state)` — Process tap, return score delta + effects
- Special cell effects: shield, freeze, multiplier, bomb, medpack, ice

### useGameEngine (hooks/useGameEngine.ts)
- Returns `{ snapshot, actions }` — React hook wrapping engine
- Snapshot includes: score, health, energy, combo, cells, stage, boss state

### ScoreSync (engine/subsystems/ScoreSync.ts)
- `queue(score, tickCount)` — Offline-capable score submission
- `flush()` — Batch send to Firestore via Cloudflare Worker

## Configuration

### Game Balance (config/game.ts)
- Grid sizes: 3x3 (classic) → 3x3 to 9x9 (evolve stages)
- Cell spawn rate, lifetime, difficulty curve parameters
- Special cell probabilities per stage
- Boss event thresholds

### Design Tokens (DESIGN.md)
- MD3 color system: Hyper-Juice Arcade dark-cyberpunk palette
- Surface, primary, secondary, tertiary, error color scales
- CSS custom properties via `--md-*` prefix

### Firebase (firebase.json)
- Hosting: single-page app with clean URLs
- Firestore: scores collection, leaderboard queries
- Security rules: server timestamps (ts == request.time)
- App Check: enabled for production

## Development

```bash
pnpm dev          # Dev server (localhost:5173)
pnpm typecheck    # TypeScript validation
pnpm test         # Unit tests (vitest, 162 tests)
pnpm test:e2e     # E2E tests (Playwright)
pnpm build        # Production build
pnpm lint         # ESLint fix
pnpm release      # semantic-release workflow
```

## Game Modes

- **Classic:** 3x3 grid, fixed difficulty, best score tracking
- **Evolve:** Progressive grid stages (3x3 → 9x9), boss events every 5 stages, rare color modes (inverted, grayscale, neon)

## Special Cells

- Red = danger (tap others, not red)
- Shield = protects 1 hit
- Freeze = pause for 1 sec
- Multiplier = 2x score
- Medpack = +1 heart
- Ice = stops cell for 2 sec
- Bomb = removes 1 heart

- Game: https://defaltadmin.github.io/donttouchpurple

- Wiki: https://github.com/defaltadmin/donttouchpurple/wiki
